{{Quote|We knew the refugee colony on ''Ejolus'' existed—and planned to deal with it before it became a hotbed of dissent.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to [[Garil Dox]]|<ref name="Empire 35" />}}
'''Ejolus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==History==
Ejolus was home to a settlement of [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] refugees shortly after the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] at the mercy of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].<ref name="Empire 35" />

Eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the catastrophe, the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] tracked down the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] there, and [[Destruction of the Ejolus outpost|wiped out]] the entire settlement.<ref name="Empire 35" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 35|''Empire'' 35]] {{1st}}
